ja.회원의 잔여 횟수가 0이 되면 AI가 해당 회원의 수강 패턴을 분석하여: When a member's remaining count reaches 0, AI analyzes the member's course attendance patterns and automatically creates a customized notification message.
ja.현재 수강권이 활성 상태인 회원에게 선등록하면, 기존 횟수가 소진되거나: If a member with an active course pre-registers, it will be automatically converted upon first attendance when the existing number of passes is exhausted or the period expires.

ja.AI는 제공된 데이터의 정확한 수치만 사용하며, 임의의 숫자를 생성하지: AI only uses exact figures from the data provided and does not generate random numbers.

ja.insight_dawn_desc: It is beautiful to see you devoting yourself in the Brahma Muhurta, when the energy of all things awakens.
ja.insight_morning_desc: In the morning full of solar energy, you are aligning your body and filling it with vibrant vitality.
ja.insight_afternoon_desc: The wisdom of choosing silence for yourself amidst the busyness of daily life to achieve harmony of body and mind is impressive.
ja.insight_evening_desc: It is a time of reflection to let go of all traces of the day behind your breath and find deep inner silence.
ja.insight_consistency_high: Your Tapas (passion) has been hot for the past month. This sincere repetition will become a fundamental strength of life.
ja.insight_consistency_mid: The heart that stands on the mat without forgetting in daily life is precious. This sacred time for yourself will be a great lamp of life.
ja.insight_milestone_50: You have already accumulated {n} deep practices. Now, feel the texture of your breath rather than the perfection of the movement, and experience 'Sati (mindfulness)' awake in every moment. 🙏
ja.insight_milestone_20: You are at a stage where you can fully feel the joy of practice and the changes in your body. The subtle stimulation of muscles is leading to positive changes in life, so please cherish this flow. ✨
ja.insight_milestone_5: It is a precious time to open the door of yoga and deepen step by step. Remember the clear original intention you had at first, and put your sincerity into every breath. 🕉️
ja.insight_milestone_0: Just sitting on the mat completes half of the practice. Do not rush, and get to know yourself slowly as much as you can breathe and as much as your body allows. 🌿
ja.insight_welcome: Waiting for your first breath. Start a precious Sadhana (practice) to meet yourself on the mat together. 🙏
ja.insight_waiting: When practice records accumulate, we will analyze your unique energy rhythm. ✨
ja.trad_dawn: It is time for the clear Prana of dawn to awaken.
ja.trad_morning: It is a vibrant morning when the warmth of the sun wakes up the energy in the body.
ja.trad_afternoon: It is a shining afternoon to look back on yourself and find alignment of your body.
ja.trad_evening: Stay in the quiet energy of the evening and empty the tension of the day.
ja.trad_night: It is time to face the true self (Atman) with deep breathing in the quiet night.
ja.season_spring: In spring, when all things revive, I hope new vitality will dwell in your practice.
ja.season_summer: In the hot summer, find inner coolness with calm breathing.
ja.season_autumn: In autumn, when energy deepens, try to bear the fruit of practice with a clear mind.
ja.season_winter: Please protect the peace of body and mind with warm heat (Tapas) that melts the cold.

zh.예: 3개월 수강권을 TBD로 등록 → 4월 1일 첫 출석 → 시작일 4: Example: Register a 3-month course ticket as TBD → First attendance on April 1st → Automatically set start date 4/1 and end date 6/30

zh.선등록 수강권은 시작일 옵션(TBD/직접지정/즉시출석)에 따라 종료일이: For pre-registered tickets, the end date is calculated according to the start date option (TBD/direct designation/immediate attendance).
zh.현재 수강권이 진행 중인 회원에게 다음 수강권을 미리 등록할 수 있습니다: Members who are currently enrolled in a course can pre-register for the next course.
zh.종료일 산정 기준: Criteria for calculating the end date
zh.잔여 횟수가 0이지만 종료일이 아직 남아있는 경우 재등록하면, 선택한 시: 잔여 횟수가 0이지만 종료일이 아직 남아있는 경우 재등록하면, 선택한 시작일부터 새 수강권 기간만큼 종료일이 산정됩니다.
zh.시작일 기준 자동 계산: Automatic calculation based on start date
zh.기존 횟수 삭제 → 새로 부여: Delete existing count → Grant new number
zh.종료일은 항상 '시작일 + 수강권 기간(개월) - 1일'로 자동 계산됩니: The end date is always automatically calculated as 'start date + course period (months) - 1 day'.
zh.횟수도 0이고 기간도 지난 경우 재등록하면, 신규 등록과 완전히 동일하게: If the number of times is 0 and the period has expired, if you re-register, it will be processed exactly the same as a new registration.
zh.기간이 만료되었지만 잔여 횟수가 남아있는 경우 재등록하면, 기존 잔여 횟: If the period has expired but there are still remaining courses, if you re-register, the existing remaining number of courses will be deleted (0) and a new course number will be granted.
zh.횟수 0 + 기간 종료 → 재등록 (신규와 동일): Count 0 + period ends → re-registration (same as new)
You can rest assured that it is not sent automatically, but rather sent after administrator approval.

zh.예: 기존 5회 남았지만 기간 만료 → 재등록 시 새 수강권 35회로 교: Example: There are 5 existing courses left, but the period has expired → When re-registering, they are replaced with a new 35-course ticket.
zh.관리자가 예약한 알림 메시지(수업 리마인더, 이벤트 안내 등)는 10분: Notification messages scheduled by the administrator (class reminders, event information, etc.) are automatically sent every 10 minutes.
zh.푸시 → SMS 순서로 발송합니다. 앱 미설치 회원에게도 SMS로 전달됩: It is sent in the order of push → SMS.
zh.매일 밤 11시에 오늘의 출석 수, 신규 가입 수, 보안 이상 여부를 정: Every night at 11 p.m., a summary report summarizing today's attendance, number of new sign-ups, and security anomalies is sent to administrators as a push notification.
zh.회원의 잔여 횟수가 0이 되면 AI가 해당 회원의 수강 패턴을 분석하여: When a member's remaining count reaches 0, AI analyzes the member's course attendance patterns and automatically creates a customized notification message.
zh.현재 수강권이 활성 상태인 회원에게 선등록하면, 기존 횟수가 소진되거나: If a member with an active course pre-registers, it will be automatically converted upon first attendance when the existing number of passes is exhausted or the period expires.
zh.관리자 대시보드에 접속하면 AI가 현재 시간대에 맞는 전략적 분석을 제공: When you access your admin dashboard, AI provides strategic analysis tailored to your current time zone.
zh.AI는 제공된 데이터의 정확한 수치만 사용하며, 임의의 숫자를 생성하지: AI only uses exact figures from the data provided and does not generate random numbers.
It is checked automatically every hour.
zh.매일 오전과 오후, 하루 2회 Firestore 데이터가 자동으로 백업됩: Firestore data is automatically backed up twice a day, every morning and afternoon.

zh.insight_dawn_desc: It is beautiful to see you devoting yourself in the Brahma Muhurta, when the energy of all things awakens.
zh.insight_morning_desc: In the morning full of solar energy, you are aligning your body and filling it with vibrant vitality.
zh.insight_afternoon_desc: The wisdom of choosing silence for yourself amidst the busyness of daily life to achieve harmony of body and mind is impressive.
zh.insight_evening_desc: It is a time of reflection to let go of all traces of the day behind your breath and find deep inner silence.
zh.insight_consistency_high: Your Tapas (passion) has been hot for the past month. This sincere repetition will become a fundamental strength of life.
zh.insight_consistency_mid: The heart that stands on the mat without forgetting in daily life is precious. This sacred time for yourself will be a great lamp of life.
zh.insight_milestone_50: You have already accumulated {n} deep practices. Now, feel the texture of your breath rather than the perfection of the movement, and experience 'Sati (mindfulness)' awake in every moment. 🙏
zh.insight_milestone_20: You are at a stage where you can fully feel the joy of practice and the changes in your body. The subtle stimulation of muscles is leading to positive changes in life, so please cherish this flow. ✨
zh.insight_milestone_5: It is a precious time to open the door of yoga and deepen step by step. Remember the clear original intention you had at first, and put your sincerity into every breath. 🕉️
zh.insight_milestone_0: Just sitting on the mat completes half of the practice. Do not rush, and get to know yourself slowly as much as you can breathe and as much as your body allows. 🌿
zh.insight_welcome: Waiting for your first breath. Start a precious Sadhana (practice) to meet yourself on the mat together. 🙏
zh.insight_waiting: When practice records accumulate, we will analyze your unique energy rhythm. ✨
zh.trad_dawn: It is time for the clear Prana of dawn to awaken.
zh.trad_morning: It is a vibrant morning when the warmth of the sun wakes up the energy in the body.
zh.trad_afternoon: It is a shining afternoon to look back on yourself and find alignment of your body.
zh.trad_evening: Stay in the quiet energy of the evening and empty the tension of the day.
zh.trad_night: It is time to face the true self (Atman) with deep breathing in the quiet night.
zh.season_spring: In spring, when all things revive, I hope new vitality will dwell in your practice.
zh.season_summer: In the hot summer, find inner coolness with calm breathing.
zh.season_autumn: In autumn, when energy deepens, try to bear the fruit of practice with a clear mind.
zh.season_winter: Please protect the peace of body and mind with warm heat (Tapas) that melts the cold.

es.insight_dawn_desc: It is beautiful to see you devoting yourself in the Brahma Muhurta, when the energy of all things awakens.
es.insight_morning_desc: In the morning full of solar energy, you are aligning your body and filling it with vibrant vitality.
es.insight_afternoon_desc: The wisdom of choosing silence for yourself amidst the busyness of daily life to achieve harmony of body and mind is impressive.
es.insight_evening_desc: It is a time of reflection to let go of all traces of the day behind your breath and find deep inner silence.
es.insight_consistency_high: Your Tapas (passion) has been hot for the past month. This sincere repetition will become a fundamental strength of life.
es.insight_consistency_mid: The heart that stands on the mat without forgetting in daily life is precious. This sacred time for yourself will be a great lamp of life.
es.insight_milestone_50: You have already accumulated {n} deep practices. Now, feel the texture of your breath rather than the perfection of the movement, and experience 'Sati (mindfulness)' awake in every moment. 🙏
es.insight_milestone_20: You are at a stage where you can fully feel the joy of practice and the changes in your body. The subtle stimulation of muscles is leading to positive changes in life, so please cherish this flow. ✨
es.insight_milestone_5: It is a precious time to open the door of yoga and deepen step by step. Remember the clear original intention you had at first, and put your sincerity into every breath. 🕉️
es.insight_milestone_0: Just sitting on the mat completes half of the practice. Do not rush, and get to know yourself slowly as much as you can breathe and as much as your body allows. 🌿
es.insight_welcome: Waiting for your first breath. Start a precious Sadhana (practice) to meet yourself on the mat together. 🙏
es.insight_waiting: When practice records accumulate, we will analyze your unique energy rhythm. ✨
es.trad_dawn: It is time for the clear Prana of dawn to awaken.
es.trad_morning: It is a vibrant morning when the warmth of the sun wakes up the energy in the body.
es.trad_afternoon: It is a shining afternoon to look back on yourself and find alignment of your body.
es.trad_evening: Stay in the quiet energy of the evening and empty the tension of the day.
es.trad_night: It is time to face the true self (Atman) with deep breathing in the quiet night.
es.season_spring: In spring, when all things revive, I hope new vitality will dwell in your practice.
es.season_summer: In the hot summer, find inner coolness with calm breathing.
es.season_autumn: In autumn, when energy deepens, try to bear the fruit of practice with a clear mind.
es.season_winter: Please protect the peace of body and mind with warm heat (Tapas) that melts the cold.

pt.insight_dawn_desc: It is beautiful to see you devoting yourself in the Brahma Muhurta, when the energy of all things awakens.
pt.insight_morning_desc: In the morning full of solar energy, you are aligning your body and filling it with vibrant vitality.
pt.insight_afternoon_desc: The wisdom of choosing silence for yourself amidst the busyness of daily life to achieve harmony of body and mind is impressive.
pt.insight_evening_desc: It is a time of reflection to let go of all traces of the day behind your breath and find deep inner silence.
pt.insight_consistency_high: Your Tapas (passion) has been hot for the past month. This sincere repetition will become a fundamental strength of life.
pt.insight_consistency_mid: The heart that stands on the mat without forgetting in daily life is precious. This sacred time for yourself will be a great lamp of life.
pt.insight_milestone_50: You have already accumulated {n} deep practices. Now, feel the texture of your breath rather than the perfection of the movement, and experience 'Sati (mindfulness)' awake in every moment. 🙏
pt.insight_milestone_20: You are at a stage where you can fully feel the joy of practice and the changes in your body. The subtle stimulation of muscles is leading to positive changes in life, so please cherish this flow. ✨
pt.insight_milestone_5: It is a precious time to open the door of yoga and deepen step by step. Remember the clear original intention you had at first, and put your sincerity into every breath. 🕉️
pt.insight_milestone_0: Just sitting on the mat completes half of the practice. Do not rush, and get to know yourself slowly as much as you can breathe and as much as your body allows. 🌿
pt.insight_welcome: Waiting for your first breath. Start a precious Sadhana (practice) to meet yourself on the mat together. 🙏
pt.insight_waiting: When practice records accumulate, we will analyze your unique energy rhythm. ✨
pt.insight_user_pattern: You are a **'{type}'** who mainly practices on **{day} at {time}**. {desc}
pt.trad_dawn: It is time for the clear Prana of dawn to awaken.
pt.trad_morning: It is a vibrant morning when the warmth of the sun wakes up the energy in the body.
pt.trad_afternoon: It is a shining afternoon to look back on yourself and find alignment of your body.
pt.trad_evening: Stay in the quiet energy of the evening and empty the tension of the day.
pt.trad_night: It is time to face the true self (Atman) with deep breathing in the quiet night.
pt.season_spring: In spring, when all things revive, I hope new vitality will dwell in your practice.
pt.season_summer: In the hot summer, find inner coolness with calm breathing.
pt.season_autumn: In autumn, when energy deepens, try to bear the fruit of practice with a clear mind.
pt.season_winter: Please protect the peace of body and mind with warm heat (Tapas) that melts the cold.

ru.insight_dawn_desc: It is beautiful to see you devoting yourself in the Brahma Muhurta, when the energy of all things awakens.
ru.insight_morning_desc: In the morning full of solar energy, you are aligning your body and filling it with vibrant vitality.
ru.insight_afternoon_desc: The wisdom of choosing silence for yourself amidst the busyness of daily life to achieve harmony of body and mind is impressive.
ru.insight_evening_desc: It is a time of reflection to let go of all traces of the day behind your breath and find deep inner silence.
ru.insight_consistency_high: Your Tapas (passion) has been hot for the past month. This sincere repetition will become a fundamental strength of life.
ru.insight_consistency_mid: The heart that stands on the mat without forgetting in daily life is precious. This sacred time for yourself will be a great lamp of life.
ru.insight_milestone_50: You have already accumulated {n} deep practices. Now, feel the texture of your breath rather than the perfection of the movement, and experience 'Sati (mindfulness)' awake in every moment. 🙏
ru.insight_milestone_20: You are at a stage where you can fully feel the joy of practice and the changes in your body. The subtle stimulation of muscles is leading to positive changes in life, so please cherish this flow. ✨
ru.insight_milestone_5: It is a precious time to open the door of yoga and deepen step by step. Remember the clear original intention you had at first, and put your sincerity into every breath. 🕉️
ru.insight_milestone_0: Just sitting on the mat completes half of the practice. Do not rush, and get to know yourself slowly as much as you can breathe and as much as your body allows. 🌿
ru.insight_welcome: Waiting for your first breath. Start a precious Sadhana (practice) to meet yourself on the mat together. 🙏
ru.insight_waiting: When practice records accumulate, we will analyze your unique energy rhythm. ✨
ru.trad_dawn: It is time for the clear Prana of dawn to awaken.
ru.trad_morning: It is a vibrant morning when the warmth of the sun wakes up the energy in the body.
ru.trad_afternoon: It is a shining afternoon to look back on yourself and find alignment of your body.
ru.trad_evening: Stay in the quiet energy of the evening and empty the tension of the day.
ru.trad_night: It is time to face the true self (Atman) with deep breathing in the quiet night.
ru.season_spring: In spring, when all things revive, I hope new vitality will dwell in your practice.
ru.season_summer: In the hot summer, find inner coolness with calm breathing.
ru.season_autumn: In autumn, when energy deepens, try to bear the fruit of practice with a clear mind.
ru.season_winter: Please protect the peace of body and mind with warm heat (Tapas) that melts the cold.
